title: Claude Code, Cursor, and the New Coding Loop
description: Agentic CLIs and IDEs have eaten autocomplete. What teams are actually shipping with Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex CLI in May 2026.

author.name: Anjali Rao
author.bio: Works on Claude Code. 8 yrs in developer tooling and ML infra.

outcomes: Pick between Claude Code, Cursor agent mode, and Codex CLI for your workflow
Wire a sub-agent to handle reviews, tests, or migrations
Run an AI code-review loop that doesn't rubber-stamp
Spot where agentic coding still backfires in May 2026

curriculum.title: Segment 2 · Claude Code vs Cursor vs Codex CLI
Segment 3 · Sub-agents and the review loop
Segment 4 · Where this breaks (and what to skip)
Hands-on Demo · Ship a sub-agent that opens a PR
What's your read? The cohort is already weighing in.

title: Computer-Using Agents, In the Wild
description: From Anthropic Computer Use to OpenAI Operator and Google's browsing agent: where these actually work today, and where they still need a human.

author.name: Vikram Iyer
author.bio: Building autonomous workflows for finance ops. ex-Meta.

outcomes: Map the computer-use landscape: Anthropic, OpenAI Operator, Project Mariner
Build a guarded browser task with rollback
Decide when an agent should ask vs act
Measure where browser agents reliably break

curriculum.title: Segment 1 · Why 2026 is the year of computer use
Segment 2 · The four leading agent runtimes
Segment 4 · What still breaks on real sites
Hands-on Demo · A bounded computer-use task
What's your read? The cohort is already weighing in.

title: MCP in Production
description: Model Context Protocol moved from spec to standard. How to actually wire agents to your tools and data without rebuilding the connector layer for every model.

author.name: Maya Krishnan
author.bio: Builds eval and tool-call infrastructure. Previously at OpenAI on RLHF.

outcomes: Stand up an MCP server in 30 minutes
Connect Claude, Cursor, and Goose to the same toolset
Pick auth and scoping patterns that don't bite later
Decide which four MCPs are worth shipping first

curriculum.title: Segment 2 · Anatomy of an MCP server

Hands-on Demo · Build a real MCP server

topDiscussionQuote.quote: The auth-scoping section saved us from re-architecting our connector layer twice.
topDiscussionQuote.author: Rahul S., Staff Eng
